member_descriptions.name: acescg_to_srgb
member_descriptions.description: [Local] OCIO color convert. 1 EXR (or PNG) in -> 1 PNG out. Loads via bepic_imageLoad (OIIO), applies bepic_colorTransform input ACES - ACEScg to output Output - sRGB with clamp on, saves 16-bit PNG via bEpic_imageSave (OIIO). For batches of non-contiguous frames, run one job per file and patch image_path + first_frame; keep auto_version false so saves go straight into the target folder.

generate an image

member_descriptions.name: image_depth_estimation_depth_anything_3
member_descriptions.title: Image Depth Estimation (Depth Anything 3)
member_descriptions.description: This subgraph takes an input image and produces a depth map using the Depth Anything 3 model, which recovers spatially consistent geometry from any number of views. It is ideal for single or multi-view images, videos, and 3D scenes where accurate depth estimation is needed for tasks like SLAM, novel view synthesis, or spatial perception. The model uses a plain transformer backbone and supports both monocular and multi-view inputs without.

member_descriptions.name: video_depth_estimation_depth_anything_3
member_descriptions.title: Video Depth Estimation (Depth Anything 3)
member_descriptions.description: This subgraph processes a video input through Depth Anything 3 to produce temporally consistent depth maps for each frame, outputting a depth video. It is ideal for video content requiring spatial geometry estimation, such as 3D reconstruction, SLAM, or novel view synthesis from moving cameras. The model uses a plain transformer backbone trained with a depth-ray representation, supporting any number of views without requiring known camera poses.

member_descriptions.name: Kling3_multiShot
member_descriptions.description: API multi-shot storyboard video via Kling 3.0 (kling-v3). 1 input image (start frame, LoadImage node) -> 1 video output (VHS_VideoCombine). Generates 1-6 sequential shots in a single generation: each shot has its own text prompt (max 512 chars) and duration set directly on the KlingVideoNode. Use for storyboards, scene sequences, and narrative clips with multiple camera cuts. Prompts go into multi_shot.storyboard_N_prompt inputs; multi_shot must match shot count exactly (e.g. '3 storyboards'). Aspect ratio defaults to 16:9, resolution to 720p - override only on explicit user request.

member_descriptions.name: character_replacement_scail_2_base
member_descriptions.title: Character Replacement (SCAIL-2 Base)
member_descriptions.description: Replaces a character in a video with a reference image using the SCAIL-2 model for end-to-end controlled animation without intermediate pose maps. Key inputs include a source video, a reference character image, and optional text prompts for style or context. Suitable for animated or live-action footage, multi-character scenes, and creative video editing where direct pose-free animation is needed; works best with moderate-length videos.
